top_signals.title: Ukraine’s Kyiv under heavy Russian attack, apartment building on fire, mayor says
top_signals.summary: Moscow has targeted Ukraine's power supplies and infrastructure this year while Kyiv has stepped up attacks on oil facilities inside Russia.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Calls grow in Akita to ban fishing for sandfish amid warming seas
top_signals.summary: Some fishery operators have voiced reluctance about a fishing ban, fearing that such a move could prevent them from catching other fish and shellfish.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: NBA star Stephen Curry signs deal with Chinese sportswear giant Li-Ning
top_signals.summary: Stephen Curry has entered into a partnership with Li-Ning, which would involve product development as well as sports culture initiatives.

top_signals.title: Osaka finds peace in defeat as Sabalenka ends Paris run
top_signals.summary: The 28-year-old left Paris describing herself as "enlightened" and at peace with the emotional swings that once ‌consumed her ‌career.
